What are all the good gmurphy comps, trying to figure out what I need to pull so she can function
bunch of standard blue units
and if you're feeling adventurous, the supports that go on virtually any team from the other realms

GMurphy is designed to work in Arc 2 with anyone whose soulforge aptitude refers to a "Lemurian" faction bonus -- that's Goliath, Faros, Miryam, and Tulu. Since GMurphy also builds a shitload of sacrifice, Murphy works well with her, since she can dramatically reduce it. Thais, Pickman, and Horla work too... but then again, they work with nearly fucking anything.

If you're not in Astral Reign fights - D-Zone or Arc 2 or an event that lets you spend keyflare to rouse - then GMurphy's comps fall into a more generalist bucket of "if it uses tentacle damage, it works"

Your plan is generally to make a bunch of shields and not die or blitz your enemies before you take any damage. You don't really heal yourself.
It's more similar to the standard Caro gameplan than anything else -- your health is a resource that you're spending to kill things, not something that keeps you alive.

the most common meta teams for kath are mono kath and ultra kath

Ultra kath: best for new players. You can run her with anybody that gives weakness, vulnerable, crit. Tinct is often seen here because she is one of the top teammates for kath and doesn't fit into other teams as easily. You can also run clem, horla, ryker, arachne, karen, erica, a lot of options

Mono kath: A chaos team with ryker and hameln is super strong, allowing you to put any chaos dps in the last slot. Lotan works, mouchette works, tawil works, and of course, kath works.

You can also run aequor kath and caro kath and they can conceivably work. However, she doesn't benefit that much from either of those realms, and aequor and caro supports are not as big of a buff for kath as chaos and ultra supports. This is why you normally don't see, e.g. thais kath. It's just less efficient than putting another dps with thais
